name: 自由职业报价换算器 | Freelance Rate Calculator
summary: A static bilingual calculator that helps freelancers estimate hourly, daily, and project rates from income goals, overhead, and risk buffers.

name: 网页研究工作台 | Web Research Workbench
summary: A product-level browser extension that organizes page captures, selected text, tab sessions, and notes into searchable project boards with export support.

name: 租房决策工作台 | Apartment Hunt Studio
summary: A product-level apartment hunting website that combines listing intake, weighted scoring, shortlist comparison, visit tracking, and export into one workflow.

name: 上下文交付包工作台 | Context Pack Studio
summary: A bilingual local-first workspace that turns fuzzy AI coding requests into structured context packs with token-aware strategy compare, history snapshots, and Markdown or JSON export.

name: 代码库交接雷达 | Repo Handoff Radar
summary: A bilingual local-first repo analysis studio that imports a project folder, detects stack and documentation gaps, scans TODO hotspots, and exports a real handoff pack.

name: 会议执行看板 | Meeting Execution Board
summary: A bilingual local-first workflow that turns meeting notes into action items, owner and due-date tracking, risks, timeline views, and exportable execution packs.

name: 磁盘清理指挥台 | Disk Sweep Command Center
summary: A bilingual local-first storage cleanup planning studio that imports a folder, surfaces large files, noisy directories, and duplicate candidates, then exports a safe cleanup plan.

name: AI 工具栈瘦身指挥台 | AI Stack Reset Board
summary: A bilingual local-first decision board that audits AI subscription overlap, renewal pressure, workflow coverage, and lean stack scenarios.

name: 收藏复活工作台 | Knowledge Revival Studio
summary: A bilingual local-first bookmark revival studio that imports browser bookmark exports, triages stale saves, schedules review, and builds time-budgeted reading packs.

name: 视觉反馈包工作台 | Visual Bug Packet Studio
summary: A bilingual local-first screenshot review studio that turns visual bug notes into structured feedback packets with pin-based annotation, compare mode, export, and local history.

name: 下载整理与批量重命名工作台 | Download Cleanup & Rename Studio
summary: A bilingual local-first download folder organization and batch rename rehearsal studio with rule composition, conflict detection, local snapshots, CSV export, and safe PowerShell export.

name: C 盘安全清理工作台 | C Drive Safety Cleaner
summary: A bilingual local-first Windows C drive cleanup studio that combines a PowerShell scanner, JSON report import, size-ranked folder and file review, risk explanations, allowlist target selection, and DryRun cleanup script export.
